message:
perf(tui): E1 dashboard hotspot remediation — thread-local caches and constant precomputation

- Thread-local cache for parse_query_terms() saves 14 redundant allocations per frame
  across 13+ render call sites
- Thread-local cache for type_filter_signature() avoids sort+join per frame via hash key
- QUICK_FILTER_CONTROLS_TOTAL_CHARS constant replaces 4 format!() allocations per frame
- cached_parsed_query_terms() method on DashboardScreen for struct-level caching
- cached_tool_latency_rows() and render_tool_latency_panel_cached() helpers
- Clone derive on ToolLatencyRow for cache support
- DashboardQuickFilter now derives Default
- integrity_failures_total field added to DbMetrics (fixes compilation)
- Fixed agents.rs test: status_counts() → compute_status_counts()
- 10 new tests covering cache correctness, invalidation, and constant verification

br-legjy.5.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
